name: persona-os
description: Persona OS by The Product Channel — drop-in operating systems for knowledge workers. Each persona ships a complete kit of Claude skills, a CLAUDE.md operating brain, a memory system, and automations. Start with Product Manager OS.

plugins.name: product-manager-os
plugins.description: A complete operating system for product managers: 40+ skills across discovery, research, strategy, planning, execution, data, go-to-market, and team comms — each grounded in the canonical book on its topic — plus a guided /setup onboarding, 5 chained slash-commands, a skill-creator, a CLAUDE.md operating brain, a memory system that learns your product and team, ready-to-wire automations, and bundled getprompts + getskills libraries.
